default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and GrowthX teams to discuss progress, issues, and new content strategies.](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Site performance issues noted; Sean to investigate slow load times on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [New content strategy proposed: create comprehensive guides on building AI agents for various business functions](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [GrowthX to expand and update tracked prompts in Profound for better SEO monitoring](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Continued growth in clicks, impressions, and LLM referrals for GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)

## Topics

### Website Performance Issues

  - [Slow load times detected on some pages, particularly on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Sean identified the app is sending unnecessary features, affecting performance](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
  - [Google PageSpeed Insights shows First Contentful Paint taking too long on mobile](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=422.0)
  - [Elvis to further investigate; Sean to look into potential fixes](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=588.0)

### Content Performance and SEO

  - [Steady growth in clicks and impressions for GrowthX content](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=856.0)
  - [LLM referrals from GA4 showing positive trends](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=883.0)
  - [Some fluctuation in Profound rankings: lost ground in Perplexity, gained in ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=887.0)
  - [Unusual behavior observed in Perplexity search results for "roleplay" term](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=691.0)

### New Content Strategy: AI Agent Building Guides

  - [Proposal to create authoritative content on building AI agents for various business functions](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1125.0)
  - [Target audience: L\&D professionals looking to implement AI solutions](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1129.0)
  - [Content structure: Introduction, 10-step guide, conclusion](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1147.0)
  - [Topics to include: sales team AI, customer service training bots, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1169.0)
  - [Sean to be more involved in content creation to ensure accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1243.0)
  - [Plan to develop a master prompt for generating consistent, high-quality content](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1273.0)

### Profound Prompt Tracking

  - [Current set of tracked prompts deemed insufficient and not fully relevant](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Goal to expand from 10 to \~100 tracked prompts](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Awaiting response from Profound support on ability to modify prompts](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)

### Miscellaneous Updates

  - [New topics loaded for auto roleplay and insurance verticals](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)
  - [Suggestion to add lawyers/corporate law as a future content cluster](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Minor website issue: "Book a Demo" text needs updating on certain pages](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Sean to investigate and address mobile page load time issues](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=256.0)
  - [Elvis to prepare list of 20 potential inputs for new AI agent building content](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1356.0)
  - [Sean to demo the process of setting up an AI roleplay system for content creation](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=1380.0)
  - [Await Profound support response regarding prompt modification capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Update "Book a Demo" text on identified pages](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)
  - [Begin planning content for lawyer/corporate law vertical](https://fathom.video/share/KPcWwvkDfTyT1qei7oEy24yQyDMzN1sa?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)

action_items.description: Investigate page speed issues on learned pages, esp. mobile First Contentful Paint
Fix "book a demo" text issue in Google search results
Follow up w/ Profound support re: editing/adding tracked prompts; relay info to Elvis
Prepare demo of AI agent setup process (start to finish) for next meeting
Prep list of 20+ potential AI agent setup topics/inputs for next meeting
